title: YBCPACK 24Pack Glass Jam Jars with Lids 350ml, Clear Chutney Jars, 12oz Preserving Jars for Jelly, Pickles, Honey
features: Packaging Content: 24 Pack 12oz (350ml) pickle jars with lids, equipped with 1 pen and 24 labels for item classification.
High Quality: The glass jam jars are composed of food-safe, lead-free glass, making them easy to clean and dishwasher-safe (lid excluded).
Leak-Proof Seal: The screw-top lids on these 12 oz chutney jars form an airtight lock, effectively locking in freshness and preventing leaks. This makes them ideal for travel and on-the-go use.
Wide 6cm Mouth: The glass preserving jar's generous opening allows for easy access to contents, making it simple to scoop out food.
Versatile Use: These glass jars are perfect for jam, pickle, chutney, jelly, honey, sauces, and more. They are also ideal for creating and gifting homemade treats.
description: 24 Pack 350ml Glass Jam Jars with Lids Material: food-grade glass Color: clear Size: 7.4 x 11 cm Package: 24pcs high quality 350ml glass chutney jars with lids, 1 pen and 24pcs stickers for classification. Safe Glass: Crafted from food-safe glass , these preserving jam jars are made of lead-free, BPA-free glass. Portable Design: With a compact 350ml capacity, these pickle jars fit seamlessly into lunch bags and picnic baskets, taking up minimal space. Leak Proof: The stainless steel screw caps guarantee an airtight, leak-proof seal on these clear preserving jars, ensuring contents stay fresh and secure. Versatile: Perfect for jam, chutney, pickle, jelly, honey, sauces, and more, this 12oz glass jar is great for preparing and packaging gifts for loved ones.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Chutney, Dry foods, Fruit, Honey, Jam, Jelly, On-the-go use, Pickle, Sauce, Vegetables
